eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: White Pine; Churchill; Douglas; Elko; Humboldt; Eureka; Lyon; Pershing; Lander; Storey; Mineral; Washoe; Carson City, NV; at 2:19 AM on JUN 26, 2019 Effective until 3:19 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS THE NEVADA DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY WITH THE JUNE MONTHLY TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM BROADCASTERS CABLE OPERATORS AND THE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE PROVIDE E A S AS A WAY FOR PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICIALS TO KEEP YOU INFORMED IN THE EVENT OF A LIFE THREATENING EMERGENCY OR DISASTER LISTEN TO THE INFORMATION WE PROVIDE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS TO STAY SAFE THIS CONCLUDES TODAYS TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM TEST TEST TEST
